response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 竹内有紀
response.overview: This spring, my wife Yuki and I celebrated our third wedding anniversary. Yuki suggested a nude photoshoot, saying that she wanted to do something special after living such a serious life up until then. I was hesitating and couldn't take the plunge, and my boss, Dango, found out about it. He introduced me to a photographer he knew and, without much thought, pushed the plan forward. On the day of the shoot, even though my wife was naked, I was still hesitant, so Dango said he would play the husband, and he got naked too, and we began the nude photoshoot.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Yuki Takeuchi
